title: phaenopyrum carolinianum
intro: Phaenopyrum carolinianum, also known as the Carolina buckthorn or Carolina chaff tree, is a small tree or shrub native to North America, particularly in the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum carolinianum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and bark in hot water to create a tea or by using the roots to create a decoction, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
